description: Brand_Allowlist (R10.2). The small, reviewed set of files permitted to contain the legacy brand strings MIHAS / KATC / Mukuba / Kalulushi / apply.mihas.edu.zm. Every other file under apps/admissions/src, apps/admissions/index.html, and backend/apps is scanned by the brand drift guards (backend/tests/unit/test_brand_drift_guard.py and apps/admissions/tests/unit/brandDriftGuard.test.ts) and must NOT contain these strings. Paths are repo-root-relative. Keep this list small and reviewed: a new entry is a deliberate decision that MIHAS/KATC are legitimate tenant data, an allowlisted historical reference, or a tenant asset in that file, never a reintroduced platform fallback.

allowlist.reason: Tenant seed fixture (R8.4): seeds the MIHAS RN, KATC COG, KATC EHT acceptance-letter profiles as tenant rows. MIHAS/KATC are legitimate tenant data here.

Tenant branding seed command: seeds brand_name/colours/contacts for the existing MIHAS/KATC tenants so official documents render styled. MIHAS/KATC are legitimate tenant fixture data here, confined to this seed command.

Application-number resolver. MIHAS appears only behind the clearly-named, tested legacy single-tenant path (_resolve_institution_code_legacy) and in docstrings; the default flow uses the assigned institution code (R9.3/R9.4).
Docstring example of the student-number format ('MIHAS/26/00001') - historical sample reference, not a runtime fallback.
Comment documenting the historical MIHAS/KATC application-number pair (R9.9); the validator accepts any institution code, no hard-coded prefix.
Comment noting legacy MIHAS- references stay matchable, plus the Lenco 'User-Agent: MIHAS/2.0' product token. New references use the BNL- prefix (R9.2).
Comment noting legacy MIHAS- payment references remain matchable by value (backward compatibility). No new MIHAS- references are generated.
Tenant email component system (historical module banner). MIHAS/KATC named as the launch tenants; covered by existing premium-email tests.
Historical documentation for the MIHAS-KATC email component system.
Tenant email design-token docstring referencing the MIHAS-KATC outbound emails.
Tenant email shell with the launch-tenant (Mukuba/MIHAS) letterhead/footer; asserted by backend/tests/unit/test_email_templates_premium.py as accepted tenant identity.
Tenant acceptance email copy referencing Mukuba Institute (launch-tenant content).
Tenant application-submitted email copy referencing Mukuba Institute (launch-tenant content).
Tenant conditional-acceptance email copy referencing Mukuba Institute (launch-tenant content).
Tenant rejection email copy referencing Mukuba Institute and the MIHAS-KATC portfolio (launch-tenant content).
Tenant password-reset email copy referencing the MIHAS admissions account (launch-tenant content).
API landing/docs HTML titled 'MIHAS Admissions API'; asserted by backend/tests/unit/test_api_docs.py. Historical product/API name, not an admissions data flow.
Uptime health-check alert email subjects ('MIHAS API Down/Recovered') - operational ops alerts, historical product name.
Module docstring banner ('Middleware chain for the MIHAS Django API') - historical product name.
Module docstring banner ('Custom permission classes for the MIHAS platform') - historical product name.
Default value for a configurable platform-name setting ('MIHAS Application System') exposed as editable admin config, not a hard-coded brand in a generic flow.
Dev-only, non-official document preview harness with MIHAS/KATC sample fixtures (R7.6). Not reachable from official-download paths.
Dev-only, non-official acceptance-letter preview harness with MIHAS/KATC sample fixtures (R7.6). Not reachable from official-download paths.
Client-side preview/draft acceptance profiles (MIHAS RN, KATC COG, KATC EHT). Preview-only per R7.6; backend tenant profiles are the official source. Allowlisted tenant sample content.
Client preview/draft renderer docstring referencing the historical MIHAS/KATC official letters it reproduces (R7.6).
Client preview intake-schedule docstring referencing MIHAS/KATC's two annual intakes (preview content, R7.6).
Client preview receipt docstring referencing the MIHAS FINANCE OFFICE tagline (preview content, R7.6).
Client preview PDF type docstrings with MIHAS/KATC examples (preview content, R7.6).
Historical documentation for the MIHAS-KATC client PDF document system.

Client preview PDF theme: MIHAS/KATC registered as tenant data (R9.7). Unknown institutions fall back to a Beanola-generic preview; MIHAS is not silently rendered. Tenant logo asset references live here.
Client preview PDF theme banner ('MIHAS-KATC PDF Theme') - preview asset/theme reference.
Client preview PDF theme banner ('MIHAS-KATC PDF Theme') - preview asset/theme reference.
Client preview PDF theme banner ('MIHAS-KATC PDF Theme') - preview asset/theme reference.
Client preview signature block referencing the shared MIHAS/KATC Managing Director signatory (preview content, R7.6).
Public tracker display-name aliases: MIHAS/KATC kept only as best-effort tenant aliases (R9.9). Unknown codes fall through to the code itself; no hard-coded default.
Submission-success screen institution alias map and launch-tenant logo asset (tenant data / logo asset reference).
Admin application-detail institution alias map (MIHAS/KATC tenant aliases) used for display when the backend code is not expanded.
Comment only: explains why there is no hard-coded MIHAS/KATC fallback map here (the map was removed in R10/R9 remediation). Retained as a reviewed reference note.
Admin institution-code field helper text using 'MIHAS' as an illustrative short-code example.
Admin tenant-profiles panel copy stating there is NO MIHAS/KATC fallback (official documents read only tenant data). Reviewed reference note.
Public marketing landing content: MIHAS/KATC physical addresses and campus facts (tenant contact data shown on the contact page).
Public marketing fact comment referencing the two campuses (Mukuba / Kalulushi) - tenant marketing data.
Zambian town option list that legitimately includes 'Kalulushi' as a real geographic location, unrelated to brand fallback.
Test-only env override global key (__MIHAS_IMPORT_META_ENV__) - historical internal identifier, not user-facing brand.
Module docstring banner ('MIHAS Application System') - historical product name.
Module docstring banner ('MIHAS Application System') - historical product name.
Design-token file banner ('MIHAS Design System') - historical product name.
Design-token CSS banner ('MIHAS Design System') - historical product name.
